comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
Session by Rock War winners Nemesis. Tommy mentions after their first (and after their second and before their third) track that they won the Rock War on 23 March 1990.
Tommy raves about another new album. This time it's Painkiller by Judas Priest.

The Rock War features Lixx & Trixx from Salisbury, Crossfire from Tonbridge and Roma from Lichfield. Roma won, with Lixx & Trixx second and Crossfire third. This was Round 9 Week 3. 'Next week is a final,' says Tommy.

Friday Night Connection from Martin Simmons of Saxmundham, who got the previous connection a couple of weeks earlier. Those selections were: Wishbone Ash's Throw Down the Sword, Excalibur's Carole Ann and Iron Maiden's Flash of the Blade.

track_listing.track: Jagged Edge - You Don't Love Me
Judas Priest - Between the Hammer and the Anvil
Nemesis - Out from the Inside (FRS session)
Lixx & Trixx - Don't Say Goodbye (Rock War act)
Iron Maiden - Public Enema Number One
Black Sabbath - Feels Good to Me
Nemesis - The Game That Never Ends (FRS session)
